title: astragalus iselyi
intro: Astragalus iselyi, also known as Isely's milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Astragalus iselyi can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and vitality.
